name: horse-provider-ics
description: OverbyteICS transport provider for the Horse web framework. HTTP/HTTPS server based on ICS THttpServer / TSslHttpServer with OpenSSL 3.x/4.x TLS (TLS 1.3, mTLS). Hybrid-interface architecture — implements IHorseRawRequest / IHorseRawResponse so Horse middleware works unchanged. v1: Delphi + Windows only; FPC seams kept for a future drapid/ICS_Lazarus port.
